violations.text: Tomato/Spinach Biscuits and Everything and Cheese Scones (requiring refrigeration due to ingredients) were observed held in a pastry display case at room temperature. Per the PIC, these food items are to be maintained refrigerated moving forward. Pastry items were Voluntarily Disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The ceiling in the coffee/3 bay sink area is covered with a swirled plaster coating and is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Per the PIC, a smooth/durable/easily cleanable surface is to be applied. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
